name: Condemned Witch
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>失</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しつ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>楽</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>らく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>女</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じょ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: When this card is Normal Summoned: You can add 1 "Forbidden" Quick-Play Spell from your Deck to your hand. During your opponent's Main Phase (Quick Effect): You can Tribute this card; Special Summon 1 Level 4 Fairy monster from your Deck, except "Condemned Witch". You can only use each effect of "Condemned Witch" once per turn.
mnst_eff: When this card is Normal Summoned: You can add 1 "Forbidden" Quick-Play Spell from your Deck to your hand. During your opponent's Main Phase (Quick Effect): You can Tribute this card; Special Summon 1 Level 4 Fairy monster from your Deck, except "Condemned Witch". You can only use each effect of "Condemned Witch" once per turn.
